claim_scope: Text-only safety fixtures informed by Phase 2D AMI overlap durations; not measured ASR output.
safe_correction_rules: Preserve raw text alongside corrected text.
Apply only lexical substitutions supported by retrieved terms and context.
Punctuation and capitalization changes may be accepted when lexical content is unchanged.
Never move words between speakers without speaker-time evidence.
speaker_attribution_rules: Do not infer which speaker produced an ambiguous word.
when_to_reject_llm_output: A partial utterance is completed with a new claim.
A forbidden hallucination pattern is introduced.
High-uncertainty overlap is rewritten rather than retained.

ami_reference_context.note: Controlled mild spans use this order of magnitude. Heavy overlap fixtures are stress tests and remain separate from AMI results.
